summary: Independent QA accepts M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 R2. The diff is limited to task-allowed sim-runner, sim-core, protocol, save-format, tests, and project state/message paths. The M5 loop runs through authoritative sim-core and GameCommandV1 from boot to postwar success, save/load, hash verification, and duplicate-postwar rejection with unchanged state hash. R2 systems blockers are resolved: explicit nested M4 save DTO/parser/copy paths strip hidden nested keys before hydration, malformed nested M4 save fields reject, and worker evidence crosses a real Node worker_threads JSON message boundary.

tests_run.result: 23 changed paths, all inside allowed paths. No apps/web, apps/desktop, client-core, map-renderer, ui, platform-browser, platform-electron, content-source, tools, docs/gates, roadmap, release artifact, manifest, or validation-report paths changed.

tests_run.result: All four M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP handoffs validated: writer initial, writer R2, systems REQUEST_CHANGES, and systems R2 ACCEPT.
Hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, and M5 playable loop hashes matched. M5 Node hash bf042e42; worker-compatible hash bf042e42; loaded hash bf042e42; postwar arrangements 1.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root vitest 34 files/244 tests passed; apps/web vitest 1 file/4 tests passed.

Non-blocking pre-existing package configuration: @monsoon/protocol has no package-level typecheck script. Protocol tests passed and root pnpm typecheck passed for all workspace packages that define typecheck.
All workspace packages with typecheck scripts passed.

tests_run.result: loadSaveV1 loaded stateHash bf042e42, extraPreserved false, and candidate keys limited to explicit DTO fields.

tests_run.result: Worker response type was string JSON; status ok; finalHash bf042e42; loadedHash bf042e42; duplicate failure rejected with stateHashUnchanged true.
No forbidden path hits among origin/main...HEAD changed files.

tests_run.command: focused probe: changed-code forbidden API/scope scan
tests_run.result: No Math.random, Date.now, performance.now, React, Pixi, Electron, telemetry, manual node battle, complex naval, full diplomacy, eval, or new Function hits in changed code files. The only scan hit was an existing test-only node:fs/promises import in tests/save-load-contract.test.ts.

decisions: ACCEPT. The implementation satisfies the accepted slice contract at this task's simulation evidence level: authoritative sim-core boot, accepted M4 command sequence, M3 postwar governance success command, two stabilization days, save/load, verify-state-hash, and duplicate postwar rejection all use GameCommandV1 or save/load boundaries.

Diff scope is acceptable. All real code changes are under apps/sim-runner, packages/protocol, packages/save-format, packages/sim-core, and tests; project task/state/message changes are allowed for routing evidence.
R2 save-format blocker is fixed. M4 runtime state is now represented by explicit nested DTOs and copy functions; QA probe confirmed hidden nested M4 keys do not hydrate into runtime state.
Malformed nested M4 save fields are covered by tests and systems probe evidence; save-format returns bounded invalid-schema reasons instead of preserving or coercing hidden authority data.

R2 worker blocker is fixed within this task's allowed scope. The M5 worker-compatible path uses node:worker_threads and JSON string request/response messages rather than a direct same-process function call.

No manual node battle, full diplomacy, complex naval warfare, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code scripting, UI/client, desktop, content-source, tools, roadmap, gate, manifest, or release scope was added.

risks.summary: The worker-host proof is a Node worker_threads boundary, not a browser Worker. This is acceptable here because apps/web/client paths are forbidden; browser Worker integration should be covered by a future allowed client task.

@monsoon/protocol has no package-level typecheck script. This is pre-existing and non-blocking for this review because protocol tests passed and root pnpm typecheck passed for packages that define typecheck.

requested_action: Lead may proceed with acceptance/closure workflow for M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001. Do not route back to simulation_engineer; no QA blockers remain.
